title: VCSDD Coherence Graph
description: Conditioned Evidence Graph (CEG) storing dependency relationships between spec documents in a VCSDD feature pipeline.

version.description: Schema version; always 1 for this format.

edges.description: Directed dependency edges with evidence-based confidence scores.

lastScanAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last frontmatter scan.

type.description: Semantic type of the node, e.g. 'design', 'requirement', 'file'.

placeholder.description: True when a node was auto-created (e.g. by addEdge) without corresponding scanned frontmatter; false when created from scanned frontmatter.

path.description: Relative file path within the feature directory.

sourceId.description: ID of the node that depends on targetId.

targetId.description: ID of the node being depended upon.

semantic.description: High-level semantic category of the dependency.

isActive.description: Soft-delete flag; inactive edges are ignored during traversal.

evidence.description: Evidence items that contribute to the confidence score.

sourceType.description: Origin of this evidence item. 'human' and 'dynamic' survive purge; others are regenerated on scan.

method.description: How this evidence was extracted, e.g. 'frontmatter', 'ast_import', 'convention'.

detail.description: Optional human-readable description of the evidence.

isNegative.description: When true, this evidence acts as counter-evidence, reducing confidence.
